title: He's awful!
scene: 两个人抱怨一位常打电话却从不留下姓名的人，围绕“他多久打一次电话”展开对话。本课用来练习一般现在时和频率副词，表达习惯性、经常性的动作。

words.eg: The traffic here is awful in the morning. 早上这里的交通很糟糕。
I telephone my parents every weekend. 我每个周末给父母打电话。
Please say that again. 请再说一遍。
He never drinks coffee at night. 他晚上从不喝咖啡。
She always gets up early. 她总是起得很早。
We often play football on Sundays. 我们周日经常踢足球。
It's our favourite subject of conversation.
It's our favourite subject of conversation.
A trip to Australia
He has just bought an Australian car and has gone to Alice Springs,
sailing vessels like the Cutty Sark were used to carry tea from China and wool from Australia.
silks from India, copper coffee pots, and beautiful handmade silverware.

grammar.explain: 一般现在时用来描述经常、反复发生的动作或习惯。主语是第三人称单数时，动词要加 -s 或 -es。
examples: He telephones me every day.（他每天给我打电话。）
They walk to school together.（他们一起走路去上学。）

grammar.explain: always、often、sometimes、never 等频率副词一般放在实义动词之前、be 动词之后。
examples: She never eats meat.（她从不吃肉。）
He is always late.（他总是迟到。）

grammar.explain: 对动作发生的频繁程度提问用 How often...?，回答常用频率副词或 every day/week 等短语。
examples: How often does he call you? — Every evening.（他多久给你打一次电话？——每天晚上。）
How often do you read books? — Very often.（你多久读一次书？——非常频繁。）

tips: ①第三人称单数动词记得加 -s/-es，这是初学者最容易漏的一点。②频率副词口诀：“实义动词前，be 动词后”。③How often 专问“多经常”，别和 When（什么时候）混淆。

title: The way to King Street
scene: 一位陌生人向路人问路，路人用一连串指令告诉他怎样拐弯、直走才能到达目的地。本课重点是用祈使句和方位介词来指路。

words.eg: Can you show me the way to the park? 你能给我指去公园的路吗？
Turn left at the bank. 在银行那里向左转。
Go straight for two minutes. 直走两分钟。
The shop is on the corner. 那家店在拐角处。
Walk past the school and stop. 走过学校然后停下。
Go along this road to the river. 沿着这条路走到河边。
It obviously could not tell the difference between Indian music and jazz!
I have visited Japan twice. 我去过日本两次。
She lives in Nigeria.
She is looking for the polish. 她正在找擦亮剂。
The Sawyers live at 87 King Street.
We're going to stay at my mother's for the weekend.

grammar.explain: 祈使句省略主语 you，用动词原形开头，用来发出命令、请求或指路。否定式用 Don't 加动词原形。
examples: Turn right at the second corner.（在第二个拐角向右转。）
Don't cross the road here.（别在这里过马路。）

grammar.explain: 指路常用 along（沿着）、past（经过）、on the left/right（在左/右边）等短语说明方向和位置。
examples: The library is on your left.（图书馆在你的左边。）
Go past the café and turn left.（走过咖啡馆然后左转。）

tips: ①问路万能句：Can you tell me the way to...? ②指路先说方向动词（Go/Turn），再说位置介词短语。③记住成对方位词：left/right、first/second，方便听懂连续指令。

title: Uncomfortable shoes
scene: 顾客试穿减价的鞋子，抱怨鞋子太小、穿着不舒服。本课借购物情景练习指示代词 these/those、名词复数以及 too 加形容词的用法。

words.eg: This chair is very uncomfortable. 这把椅子很不舒服。
I need a new pair of gloves. 我需要一双新手套。
These shoes are too small for me. 这双鞋对我来说太小了。
What size do you take? 你穿多大尺码？
The coats are on sale today. 大衣今天减价销售。
That watch is too dear. 那块表太贵了。
Then I arrived home at six o'clock yesterday evening.
She does the housework.
He looks ill and cannot eat his lunch.
Can't you wait till this afternoon?
Mrs. Sawyer usually stays at home in the morning,
Sam and I had lunch together today.
Then I arrived home at six o'clock yesterday evening.
They arrive home early.
Did he telephone again last night?
Then I arrived home at six o'clock yesterday evening.
I think I must look in another shop.
The dentist is very busy at the moment.

grammar.explain: these（这些）指近处复数事物，those（那些）指远处复数事物，后面接可数名词复数。
examples: These shoes are comfortable.（这些鞋很舒服。）
Those bags are on sale.（那些包在减价。）

grammar.explain: 鞋、手套、袜子等成双的东西用 a pair of 计量，后面接名词复数；两双用 two pairs of。
examples: I bought a pair of shoes.（我买了一双鞋。）
She has two pairs of socks.（她有两双袜子。）

grammar.explain: too 放在形容词前，表示“太……（以至于不行）”，带有否定或抱怨的语气。
examples: These shoes are too small.（这双鞋太小了。）
The room is too cold.（房间太冷了。）

tips: ①these/those 后面永远跟复数名词。②鞋、袜、手套论“双”：a pair of + 复数。③too 是“太……了”的抱怨语气，和 very（很）表达程度但不带负面含义要区分。

title: Terrible toothache
scene: 一个人牙疼得厉害，朋友劝他必须去看牙医。本课通过看病情景练习情态动词 must，表示“必须、不得不”的强烈建议或义务。

words.eg: I have a terrible headache. 我头疼得厉害。
She has a toothache today. 她今天牙疼。
You must see a dentist soon. 你得赶快去看牙医。
You must take this medicine. 你必须吃这个药。
He is ill and stays in bed. 他病了，躺在床上。
The dentist may pull out the bad tooth. 牙医可能会拔掉那颗坏牙。
I want some envelopes, please.
Do you have any writing paper?
A shop assistant comes to her and asks if she wants any help.
What size?
Do you want a pad?
And I want some glue.
And I want a large box of chalk, too.
"We will change it soon," the man said.
I feel awful.
They look very uncomfortable.
We must call the doctor.
Thank you, doctor.

grammar.explain: must 表示“必须、不得不”，后面直接接动词原形，不随人称变化，也不加 -s。
examples: You must go to bed early.（你必须早点睡。）
We must be quiet in the library.（在图书馆我们必须保持安静。）

grammar.explain: 把 must 提到主语前构成疑问句：Must I...? 肯定回答 Yes, you must. 否定常用 needn't（不必）。
examples: Must I stay here? — No, you needn't.（我必须待在这儿吗？——不，你不必。）
Must we finish it today? — Yes, you must.（我们必须今天完成吗？——是的，必须。）

tips: ①must 后面永远跟动词原形，别加 to，也别加 -s。②“不必”不是 mustn't（那是“禁止”），而是 needn't。③身体不适说 have a + 病名：have a toothache/headache/cold。

title: Carol's shopping list
scene: 卡罗尔列了一张购物清单，准备去商店买各种日用品。本课借购物情景练习 some/any 的用法，以及可数与不可数名词的区分。

words.eg: I made a shopping list. 我列了一张购物清单。
She bought a pound of sugar. 她买了一磅糖。
He reads a magazine on the train. 他在火车上读杂志。
We need some toothpaste. 我们需要一些牙膏。
There isn't any soap here. 这里没有肥皂。
Do we have any sugar? 我们有糖吗？
My boss answered the telephone.
Ah yes, I remember now.
Open your mouth, Jimmy.
Show me your tongue. Say, 'Ah'.
He has a bad cold, too!
"The weather is cold there, so take a warm sweater."
That's good news for Jimmy.
Damaged money has always been a headache, but banks are kinder than you might think.
Terrible toothache
I want to see the dentist, please.

grammar.explain: some（一些）多用于肯定句，any 多用于否定句和疑问句，两者都可修饰不可数名词或复数可数名词。
examples: There is some milk in the cup.（杯子里有一些牛奶。）
Is there any bread on the table?（桌上有面包吗？）

grammar.explain: 可数名词有单复数，能用数字直接数；不可数名词（如 soap、sugar、milk）没有复数，计量时借助 a pound of、a bar of 等短语。
examples: I need two magazines.（我需要两本杂志。）
She wants a bar of soap.（她想要一块肥皂。）

tips: ①记忆口诀：some 用于肯定，any 用于否定和疑问。②不可数名词不能说 a soap，要用 a bar of soap、a pound of sugar。③请求或邀请时，疑问句也常用 some，如 Would you like some tea?

title: Roast beef
scene: 一个人正计划为晚餐做一顿烤牛肉，考虑要准备哪些蔬菜和甜点。本课用做饭计划的情景练习 be going to 表示打算做的事，以及 some/any 的搭配。

words.eg: I am going to roast some beef. 我打算烤一些牛肉。
This beef smells very good. 这牛肉闻起来很香。
She is cutting a cabbage. 她正在切一棵卷心菜。
We need some potatoes for dinner. 晚饭我们需要一些土豆。
There are some beans on the plate. 盘子里有一些豆子。
What is for dessert tonight? 今晚甜点吃什么？
The doctor gives him some medicine and says, "He will be well soon."
Does he have a temperature, doctor?
We had better go back to the station now, Ken.
Certainly, doctor.
You are better now, but you mustn't get up yet.
Her friends asked, "Have you eaten Italian food yet?"
And he mustn't eat rich food.
Her friends asked, "Have you eaten Italian food yet?"
Yes. He must remain in bed for another two days.

grammar.point: be going to 表示打算
grammar.explain: be going to 加动词原形，表示打算做或计划做的事。be 随主语变为 am/is/are。
examples: I am going to cook dinner.（我打算做晚饭。）
They are going to visit us tomorrow.（他们打算明天来看我们。）

grammar.explain: 把 be 动词提到主语前构成疑问句：Are you going to...? 回答用 Yes, I am. / No, I'm not.
examples: Is she going to buy any beef? — Yes, she is.（她打算买些牛肉吗？——是的。）
What are you going to make?（你打算做什么？）

tips: ①be going to 结构里 be 动词要随主语变：I am / he is / we are。②后面接动词原形，表示“打算、计划”。③蔬菜大多可数，potato、tomato 复数加 -es。

title: Going on holiday
scene: 一家人准备外出度假，互相询问是否已经收拾好行李、装好了衣物。本课通过出行准备的情景引入现在完成时，重点是 already（已经）的用法。

words.eg: We are going on holiday next week. 我们下周去度假。
I have already packed my bag. 我已经收拾好包了。
Have you packed the suitcase? 你收拾好手提箱了吗？
This suitcase is very heavy. 这个手提箱很重。
Take a warm sweater with you. 带一件暖和的毛衣。
The weather is fine today. 今天天气很好。
The play was very interesting.
He knew I collected match boxes and asked me whether my collection was growing.
A friend wants to talk to her son, Tom.
We must be quiet in the library. 在图书馆我们必须保持安静。
On the way home, my wife said to me, 'Don't drive so quickly!
"The weather is cold there, so take a warm sweater."
On the way home, my wife said to me, 'Don't drive so quickly!
admitted at once that he had tried to break into the shop during the night but had got stuck in the chimney.
Dad has already packed the car.
Can I have the key to the front door, please?
Not a baby

grammar.explain: 现在完成时由 have/has 加过去分词构成，表示过去发生、对现在有影响或已经完成的动作。
examples: I have finished my work.（我已经完成了工作。）
She has packed the suitcase.（她已经收拾好了手提箱。）

grammar.explain: already（已经）用于肯定句，通常放在 have/has 和过去分词之间，强调动作已经完成。
examples: We have already had lunch.（我们已经吃过午饭了。）
He has already left home.（他已经离开家了。）

tips: ①现在完成时公式：have/has + 过去分词，第三人称单数用 has。②already 表示“已经”，放在助动词和动词之间。③询问是否完成用 Have you...? 回答 Yes, I have. / No, I haven't.
